playbook.intent: Chaotic week with context-switch tax → honest weekly cadence with theme-days and focus discipline.
playbook.scope: Solo founder defines an operating rhythm for a one-person SaaS: which day for shipping, which for marketing, which for inbox, plus the kill-switch for context-switching that destroys solo productivity. Exit artifact is a written operating system + 4-week trial run.

success-criteria.criterion: Theme assigned per day of the week
Revenue-relevance filter rule written and applied

stage.name: Audit cadence
stage.intent: Look honestly at where the past 4 weeks went.

tasks.task: Audit last 4 weeks of calendar + commits
Tag each block by theme (ship / market / support / admin)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the audit is honest (not aspirational). Refuse to design before auditing.

stage.name: Design
stage.decision-gate: Advance when theme-days cover the full week + filter rule fits one paragraph.

stage.name: Tripwires

tasks.task: Define burnout tripwires (sleep / weekend work / inbox latency)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each tripwire has a threshold + action. Refuse vague 'I'll notice'.

stage.name: Trial
stage.intent: Run the system for 4 weeks. Then review.

tasks.task: Adjust system based on real data

stage.decision-gate: Required output: revised OS after 4 weeks. The first design is always wrong.

extra.value: [Productivity-tool selection — bring whatever you use, Personal life balance — work-cadence only here]
[Solo founder running for ≥4 weeks (need real data on actual cadence), Existing weekly review habit (sunday-roadmap-ritual recommended)]
[Designing the perfect system then never running the trial, Skipping tripwires — burnout shows up after it's already happened]
['Did I run the system for 4 full weeks before declaring it broken?', 'Are the tripwires measurable, or just feelings?']

{human: faion get-content solo-founder-operating-system --format md, agent: faion get-content solo-founder-operating-system --format context, json: faion get-content solo-founder-operating-system --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
